---
title: "Evanns Morales-Cuadrado"
description: "@evannsmc is the personal research website of Evanns Morales, a Robotics Ph.D student at Georgia Tech."
image: "files/site_icon/home-share-preview.png"
image-alt: "evannsmc site logo"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
#title-block-header {
  display: none;
}
</style>

<div class="home-page">
  <section class="home-hero">
    <div class="home-hero-copy">
      <p class="home-hero-kicker">Robotics Ph.D student · Georgia Tech</p>
      <h1 class="home-hero-title">Evanns Morales-Cuadrado</h1>
      <p class="home-hero-summary">
        I work on safe autonomy for hardware systems, especially UAVs, with an emphasis on aggressive low-level control, trajectory planning, and getting theory from the page, to the code, to the real world. I have broken many drones, put them back together, and learned from every headache-incuding mistake.
      </p>
      <p class="home-edu-heading">Education</p>
      <div class="home-meta-grid">
        <div class="home-meta-card">
          <div class="home-meta-card-header">
            <img src="./files/about/Georgia_Tech_Yellow_Jackets_logo.svg.png" alt="Georgia Tech logo" class="home-meta-logo">
            <div>
              <p class="home-meta-value">Ph.D. in Robotics · Georgia Tech</p>
              <p class="home-meta-subtle">4.0 GPA · Summa Cum Laude · Deploying Novel Safe Autonomy Algorithms on Hardware · Aug 2022 - Present</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="home-meta-badge">#2 Public ECE Program in the U.S.</span>
          <span class="home-meta-badge">Ph.D. under Eckman Award winner, <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=jVFH7asAAAAJ" target="_blank">Dr. Samuel Coogan</a></span>
          <!-- , Eckman Award recipient</span> -->
        </div>
        <div class="home-meta-card">
          <div class="home-meta-card-header">
            <img src="./files/about/UTA_logomark.png" alt="UT Arlington logo" class="home-meta-logo">
            <div>
              <p class="home-meta-value">Honors B.S. in EE · University of Texas</p>
              <p class="home-meta-subtle">Summa Cum Laude · Minors in Math & Physics · Certificate in Unmanned Vehicle Systems</p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <span class="home-meta-badge home-meta-badge-mentor">Mentored by <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rMRit3UAAAAJ" target="_blank">Dr. Frank Lewis</a> —<br><span class="home-meta-badge-subline">World #1 in Optimal Control & Reinforcement Learning</span><br><span class="home-meta-badge-subline">Top 1% Cited Researcher in the World</span></span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="home-contact-list">
        <span class="home-contact-item">egm [at] gatech [dot] edu</span>
        <span class="home-contact-item">evannsmc [at] gmail [dot] com</span>
        <span class="home-contact-item">Atlanta, GA</span>
      </div>
      <div class="home-link-row">
        <a class="home-link-pill primary" href="https://github.com/evannsm" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
        <a class="home-link-pill primary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/evanns-morales/" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
        <a class="home-link-pill primary" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=FY9tS9oAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank">Google Scholar</a>
        <a class="home-link-pill primary" href="https://orcid.org/0009-0000-3928-6243" target="_blank">ORCID</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <aside class="home-hero-sidebar">
      <figure class="home-hero-portrait">
        <img src="./files/LabPhoto.png" alt="Evanns Morales-Cuadrado in the lab" class="home-hero-photo">
        <figcaption class="home-hero-caption">C'est Moi.</figcaption>
      </figure>
    </aside>
  </section>
</div>
```


## Inside the Lab

I am a Robotics/ECE Ph.D student in the Formal Methods & Autonomous Control of Transportation Systems ([FACTS](https://coogan.ece.gatech.edu/)) Lab at the Georgia Institute of Technology under the supervision of Dr. Samuel Coogan.

My robotics work centers around hardware applications of safe autonomous control algorithms. In particular, I work on safe and efficient path planning and control synthesis in the face of onboard computational constraints. Much of my work involves hardware demonstrations of novel methods on quadrotor UAVs and unmanned ground vehicles (UGVs), so I've got some cool videos of drones flying autonomously and a lot of terrible videos of them crashing.


## My Latest Project

```{=html}
<a class="home-latest-project" href="./projects/rtd-rax/">
  <div class="home-latest-project-copy">
    <div class="home-latest-project-main">
      <p class="home-latest-project-title"><code>RTD-RAX</code></p>
      <div class="home-latest-project-tags" aria-label="RTD-RAX topic tags">
        <span class="home-latest-project-tag">Real-Time Planning</span>
        <span class="home-latest-project-tag">Disturbance Handling</span>
        <span class="home-latest-project-tag">Reachability Analysis</span>
        <span class="home-latest-project-tag">Robotics</span>
        <span class="home-latest-project-tag">Safety</span>
        <span class="home-latest-project-tag">Research</span>
      </div>
      <p class="home-latest-project-text">
        Runtime-assurance trajectory planning, with online verification and repair instead of conservative offline safety buffers.
        RTD-RAX extends Reachability-based Trajectory Design by separating fast candidate generation from online safety certification. The planner stays agile, while a verifier certifies each trajectory under the actual measured conditions and repairs unsafe candidates before execution. 
      </p>
    </div>
    <span class="home-latest-project-link">Open RTD-RAX</span>
  </div>
  <div class="home-latest-project-preview">
    <img src="./projects/rtd-rax/angled_repair_view_two_repairs.gif" alt="RTD-RAX angled obstacles with repair animation">
  </div>
</a>
```


## Beyond the Lab

```{=html}
<div class="home-snapshot">
  <div class="home-snapshot-grid">
    <div class="home-snapshot-card">
      <p class="home-snapshot-kicker">Roots</p>
      <p class="home-snapshot-title">Boricua de pura cepa.</p>
      <p class="home-snapshot-copy">
        Proud of where I'm from and always thinking of ways to connect with my culture.
        At Georgia Tech I helped co-found "BORI" to provide a welcoming place for Puerto Rican students and promote our culture across campus.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="home-snapshot-card">
      <p class="home-snapshot-kicker">Research</p>
      <p class="home-snapshot-title">I love building cool things and making them work.</p>
      <p class="home-snapshot-copy">
        From undergraduate research at UT Arlington to my PhD at Georgia Tech. My next stop is in Albuquerque, NM for a Summer 2026 internship at Sandia National Laboratories.
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="home-snapshot-card">
      <p class="home-snapshot-kicker">Recreation</p>
      <p class="home-snapshot-title">We like to enjoy life.</p>
      <p class="home-snapshot-copy">
        I spend whole days outside playing mediocre basketball when I'm able to. I'm also a somewhat decent salsa dancer (and getting better too).
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="home-snapshot-links">
    <a class="home-snapshot-link primary" href="./about/">More About Me</a>
    <a class="home-snapshot-link" href="./journey/">Open Journey Map</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
